title: Edit content here, ship ideas there
intro: This stack combines TinaCMS (collections + preview), Next.js, Storybook for UI, and Recurly on checkout—use the steps below as your click path.

steps.title: Open the CMS
steps.body: Create and edit posts as MDX and adjust the home intro JSON—all from the admin, no deploy required for content.

steps.title: Plans (DEMO collection)
steps.body: The DEMO collection (`content/demo/checkout-plans.json`) powers `/plans`—pick a tier, then continue to `/checkout` with Recurly.

steps.title: Sample blog post
steps.body: Posts live under content/posts as MDX—this one is a simple article route.
